Background.occupation: App-based delivery courier and warehouse gig worker
Background.key_experience: Attending six different schools before the age of 14, which forced him to adopt the personality traits and interests of whatever group was most popular to ensure social survival and avoid conflict.

Current_State.recent_memory: Spent forty minutes reading through a viral Twitter thread about a celebrity drama he previously didn't care about, only to find himself agreeing with the most-liked reply without checking the facts.
